summary: Comprehensive testing completed for AJPL Calculator 4 major features: Customer History, All Bills, Item Sales History, and Manager Visit Summary. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend pages accessible and working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Customer row navigation requires clicking eye icon specifically rather than entire row

integration_issues.issue: Summary buttons only visible for bills in 'sent' status - correct behavior but limits testing

passed_tests: All 15 API endpoints responding correctly (100% success)
Customer List page loading and displaying data
Customer History page accessible and showing profile cards
All Bills page with search and status filtering
Item History page with KPI cards (Total Sold, Weight, Revenue)
Navigation between all new pages working
Sidebar showing Customers and All Bills links
Search functionality on Customers and Bills pages
Status filtering on All Bills page
Customer analytics API returning correct data
Item sales history API working for Necklace
Bill summary API working for manager view
